mapper.select: /* SQL ID : OnlnPltfrmUserDAO.onlnPltfrmUserList 설 명 : 온라인플랫폼사용자목록 */ SELECT * FROM TB_LMS_ONLN_PLTFRM_USER WHERE ONLN_PLTFRM_AUTHRT_ID = #{onlnPltfrmAuthrtId}

/* SQL ID : OnlnPltfrmUserDAO.pendingOnlnPltfrmUserSelect 설 명 : 대기중온라인플랫폼사용자조회 */ SELECT USR.* FROM TB_LMS_ONLN_PLTFRM_AUTHRT AUTHRT JOIN TB_LMS_ONLN_PLTFRM_USER USR ON AUTHRT.ONLN_PLTFRM_AUTHRT_ID = USR.ONLN_PLTFRM_AUTHRT_ID AND USR.PLTFRM_USER_STSCD = 'active' AND USR.ONLN_PLTFRM_USER_ID NOT IN ( SELECT ONLN_PLTFRM_USER_ID FROM TB_LMS_ONLN_MEETNGRM WHERE MEETNGRM_SDTTM BETWEEN #{meetngrmSdttm} AND #{meetngrmEdttm} OR MEETNGRM_EDTTM BETWEEN #{meetngrmSdttm} AND #{meetngrmEdttm} GROUP BY ONLN_PLTFRM_USER_ID HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2 ) WHERE AUTHRT.ONLN_PLTFRM_STNG_ID = #{onlnPltfrmStngId} AND ROWNUM = 1
